title.en: This is Ye Tian's current strength.

content.en:
The eighth sequence of the Dao rules is ten percent complete, and the cultivation is to reach the late stage of the twofold Dao realm.

It can be said that Ye Tian's current strength is in the Fifth Supreme Dao Realm, and he can be called invincible.

If he fights the Linglong Spear and the Dao Strange Thing again, he can kill it in a short time.

This is Ye Tian's current strength.

However, when he reached the eighth-sequence supreme Dao rule ten-percent consummation realm, he couldn't continue to improve the eighth-sequence supreme Dao rule now, and these eighth-sequence supreme Dao rule item fragments in his hand were useless to him.

"When you kill all the strange things that Long Yin led to the Dao, leave here and take these things out!"

Ye Tian decided.

Moreover, he was also ready to try to comprehend the rules of the seventh sequence of supreme paths.

"It's a pity that the Wuji Dao Fruit has been used up!" Ye Tian muttered.

But he has no regrets.

If he hadn't used up the Infinite Supreme Dao Fruit, his strength would not have increased so quickly, and he would not easily break the shackles of the Double Supreme Dao Realm.

And in these years, he relied on his strong strength to create a lot of trouble for the Supreme Dao Void Demon, which made the Supreme Dao Void Demon not completely capture the battlefield of the True Dao Domain.

If he hadn't eaten the Wuji Dao Fruit at the beginning, maybe the forces such as Taisu Palace would have given up directly when they saw that the situation was too bad!

In that case, the land beyond Eternity may be gone.

Of course, he now comprehended that the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rules were more integrated than the other Supreme Dao Realms, after all, he had still witnessed the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rules with his own eyes, and the other Supreme Dao Realms had never even seen them.

"It would be nice if you could get the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item fragments!"

Ye Tian could only think about it like this, any fragment of the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item came from the body of the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm Supreme Dao Strange Thing, and that kind of existence could easily crush his body and kill him countless times.

Therefore, he didn't want to get the seventh sequence of Supreme Dao Rule item fragments now.

And his knowledge is limited, and he only knows that the Infinite Supreme Dao Fruit helps to comprehend the rules of the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao.

But he didn't believe that the Seven Supreme Dao Realms of Taisu Palace relied on the Wuji Supreme Dao Fruit to comprehend the rules of the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao, and there must be other ways.

......

Taisu Battle City.

The Longqin Palace Master had just returned from the battle outside, and Ye Tian immediately came to ask for advice.

"Longqin Palace Master!"

Ye Tian said hello.

"Ye Tian, what's the matter?" asked the Longqin Palace Master.

Ye Tian immediately said his question: "Longqin Palace Master, do you know how to quickly comprehend the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rules?"

"Comprehend the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rules???" The Longqin Palace Master wondered, "What are you asking about now, let's first raise the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to the tenth realm." "

"I've already comprehended the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to the Ten Percent Realm!" Ye Tian said.

"What !!!"

The Longqin Palace Master's eyes widened, a little incredulous.

The eighth sequence of the Supreme Dao rules is ten percent realm, and it took her countless Supreme Dao eras to reach this realm!

And how long does Ye Tiancai cultivate?

Seeing that the Longqin Palace Master didn't believe it, Ye Tian directly urged the eighth sequence to the Dao rules.

Rumble!!!!

The eighth sequence of the Ten Percent Realm Supreme Dao Rules erupted, and the terrifying Supreme Dao Rules filled the surrounding void.

This moment.

The Longqin Palace Lord was completely convinced.

Wow!

Ye Tian retracted his breath and no longer released the eighth sequence to the Dao Rule.

"Ye Tian, your progress is too fast, could it be that you entered a certain strange place, killed a large number of Supreme Dao Strange Things, and arranged them into a Supreme Dao Strange Thing Array?"

Ye Tian didn't speak, and the Longqin Palace Master didn't continue to ask.

However, for Ye Tian's question, the Longqin Palace Lord also gave an answer: "If you want to comprehend the rules of the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao, there are not many ways, one is to use the infinite years to slowly comprehend, maybe one day you will comprehend it; second, it is to use some special treasures to comprehend the rules of the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao, such as the Wuji Supreme Dao Fruit, Taihao Golden Dragon Wood and other treasures......;

The Longqin Palace Lord said one method after another, but Ye Tian frowned slightly, because these methods were all known to him, and at most some treasures were not clear.

Suddenly.

The Longqin Palace Lord said another way: "There is also an extremely dangerous way, that is, to enter the Void Domain's Glass Light Rift, but entering the sixfold peak to the Dao Realm, there is a certain chance to be able to comprehend the seventh sequence of the Dao Rules, but it is too dangerous there, and you will die if you stay for a long time." "

Glass light cracks.

Ye Tian became interested.

And after the explanation of the Longqin Palace Master, he knew what kind of place it was.

The Supreme Dao Void Demon comes from the Void Domain, and the territory of the Infinite Domain belongs to the Innate Origin Domain, and the Innate Origin Domain is more than this, and many Innate Origin Domains unite to resist the invasion of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, and forts are built everywhere in the Void Domain, so as to prevent the Innate Origin Domain from invading the major Innate Origin Domains.

But all along, the major innate origin domains have been at a disadvantage.

And the Glass Light Rift is a special place in the Void Domain, which is filled with the power of the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, but the Glass Light Rift is filled with a terrifying power that can corrode the body of the Sixth Rank Dao Realm.

The key is that when you comprehend the rules of the seventh sequence of the supreme path, it is easy to indulge in it, and finally lead to a complete fall.

And if you don't control the time of enlightenment well, it is easy to cause eternal damage to the body, then it is not worth it.

Moreover, even if you can resist the urge to come out in time, you will have to face other threats, such as the threat of the Supreme Void Demon.

That Liguang Rift was relatively close to the previous Luohe Fortress, but after all, it was not occupied, and there were often sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons who ventured to enlighten, and they would definitely encounter them.

Now that the Luohe fortress has been breached, the danger is even greater.

"Longqin Palace Master, how do I go to the Void Domain?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Ye Tian, you can't go out of the battlefield now, it's useless to say it!"

Ye Tian no longer concealed it, and directly revealed: "I have a doppelganger left in the outside world, and I want to take a risk and give it a try." "

"Doppelganger!"

The Longqin Palace Lord was surprised.

She had a guess in her heart, it was estimated that Ye Tian's clone went to a strange place, killed a lot of Supreme Dao strange things, and obtained the fragments of the eighth Sequence Supreme Dao rule items, which was able to raise the eighth sequence Supreme Dao rule to ten percent of the realm so quickly.

"Ye Tian, Taisu Palace does have a way to let you enter the Void Domain, but Taisu Palace doesn't know about the Void Domain, maybe you didn't reach the Glass Light Rift, and your clone was discovered and killed by the Supreme Dao Void Demon. The Longqin Palace Lord reminded.
